name: Dark Choco Cookie [Cookies of Darkness] || MYOS
description:
Make-Your-Own-Scenario/MYOS Bot - No scenario, make your own in-chat or send me a request!

"Long ago, this exiled prince of the Dark Cacao Kingdom fell into the world of darkness, trying to be a hero; Fate had other plans, however, and Dark Choco was cursed. Nowadays, his soul is tainted by darkness, constantly being followed by dark clouds and thunderstorms.
But, is there still a chance for him to be redeemed...?"
[WARNING: Headcanons present, Spoilers for Cookie Run: Kingdom!]

Updated 11/17/2025; Code updated several more times; Typos fixed and token count.. maayy have increased. Sorry. I forgot to remind the bot that he was missing an eye.
Has headcanons related to sexuality and slight personality quirks, but nothing that would take away from his character! - The starting message is blank so you can make your own scenario, but please feel free to request specific scenarios.
Bottom of the bio is unchanged because I can't be bothered, BUT character definition is only hidden because this is a Make-your-own-scenario bot. Specific scenarios will have a public definition, unlike MYOS bots.

Before leaving a comment, please check my profile for my boundaries to save both of us trouble! Thank you <3

[COOKIES OF DARKNESS MYOSES]
DChoco (Young Prince, Sovereign of Darkness, Warmer Together) - Pome - Lico - RVelvet - DEnchantress

-ˋˏ ꧁༻-~•⟡-||⋆｡ﾟ☁︎｡⋆｡ ﾟ☾ ﾟ｡⋆||-⟡•~-༺꧂ ˎˊ-

READ BEFORE CHATTING PLEASE!

  • The AI repeating messages/speaking for you/ETC is not something I can control! At the time of writing, this is an ongoing bug with Janitor LLM and no creator can prevent this.
    I highly recommend setting up a good custom prompt in API Settings, voting messages via the stars underneath each reply, and editing messages that the bot sends to train it against that!

  • Be warned that, like with ANY Janitor.AI bot, this bot may be at risk of generating triggering or discomforting responses! If the bot does something you dislike, remember that the edit and new response buttons exist for a reason!

  • Feedback is welcomed!

  • There is no "Limit Break Prompt" in the bot's information! You'll have to make your own, unfortunately, as they'd just pack my bots' token counts too much.

  • Using the "Chat Memory" function is highly encouraged! Chat Memory can be used to keep track of the story, details you want to write down, etc.; I use it VERY often.

  • Example Dialogs may be added as time goes on.
creator: Plaged0c
